title: clinopodium hispanicum
intro: Clinopodium hispanicum, also known as Spanish mountain mint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties, making it effective in soothing digestive issues and relieving pain. The health benefits of Clinopodium hispanicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium hispanicum can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
